mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN user_id = #{userId} THEN friend_id ELSE user_id END FROM friend WHERE (user_id = #{userId} OR friend_id = #{userId}) AND status = '1'
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM friend WHERE ((user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}) OR (user_id = #{friendId} AND friend_id = #{userId})) AND status = '1'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friend WHERE ((user_id = #{userIdA} AND friend_id = #{userIdB}) OR (user_id = #{userIdB} AND friend_id = #{userIdA})) AND status = '1'
